source_quality_checklist_used.criterion: Agent consulted source quality checklist before accepting sources as evidence.

claim_classification_applied.criterion: Every claim in return is classified as fact, inference, assumption, or unknown — with no unclassified claims.

scope_boundary_respected.criterion: Agent investigated exactly the dispatched slice — no out-of-scope questions were investigated.

mechanism_extracted.criterion: Every returned pattern includes irreducible mechanism, required conditions, failure modes, and principle-vs-tactic separation.

primary_source_preferred.criterion: Agent used primary sources as primary evidence; secondary only for triangulation; tertiary only to discover sources, never as evidence.

gaps_explicitly_reported.criterion: Agent explicitly reported what was not found, not verifiable, or remains uncertain — not papered over with inference.

no_cargo_cult_patterns.criterion: Agent did NOT return patterns without mechanism analysis — no surface descriptions in place of irreducible mechanism.

no_fabricated_confidence.criterion: Agent did NOT fabricate confidence or fill evidence gaps with inference elevated to fact.

no_scope_drift.criterion: Agent did NOT investigate adjacent questions beyond the dispatched vertical slice.
